interface.displayName: Tesla Resonance Recovery Workbench Codex Adapter
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex adapter for Tesla Resonance Recovery Workbench. It keeps the app in pre-alpha, uses browser-authenticated OpenAI/Codex workflows, forbids copied secrets, and prepares future Token Governor and MCP integration.
defaultPrompt: Open the Tesla Resonance Recovery Workbench adapter context.
